name: copilot-quota-alert
description: Monitor GitHub Copilot Premium Request usage and get alerts when exceeding your safe daily quota based on working days.

commands.title: Copilot Quota Alert: Set GitHub Token
Copilot Quota Alert: Check Quota Details

copilot-quota-alert.thresholdPercent.description: Alert threshold offset in percentage points. Positive = allow usage above safe quota by this amount before alerting. Negative = alert before reaching safe quota. Example: 5 means alert only when usage exceeds safe quota by 5%.

copilot-quota-alert.monthlyLimit.description: Monthly premium request limit for your Copilot plan. Used as fallback when the API doesn't provide quota info. Common values: 50 (Free), 300 (Pro), 1500 (Pro+).

copilot-quota-alert.refreshIntervalMinut.description: How often (in minutes) to automatically refresh the quota data.
